title: VimFu — :s Captured Groups
description: Use \(\) to capture groups in :s patterns. Refer to them with \1 through \9 in the replacement.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
John Smith
Jane Doe
Bob Jones
Alice Lee

steps.say: Capture groups let you rearrange matched text. Use escaped parentheses to capture, and backslash one through nine to refer to them.

steps.comment: --- Demo: swap first and last names ---

steps.say: Swap first and last names. Capture each word, then reverse them.
Last name comma first name. Backslash one is the first capture, backslash two is the second.
Escaped parentheses capture. Backslash one through nine recall them. Rearrange any text.
